author: rotifer-alpha
description: Cross-fund event family concentration guard (ALPHA-001 §8). Prevents the portfolio from over-concentrating in correlated prediction markets. Pure function: input = OrderIntent + portfolio exposure map, output = allow/deny. The concentration limit (maxEventUsdc) is NOT an evolvable parameter — it is a hard safety floor defined by the operator.

eventFamilyKey.description: Normalized event family identifier (slug + question hash)

maxEventUsdc.description: Hard ceiling for any single event family

transparency.note: Pure computation gate. The exposure map is loaded once per cron invocation (not per fund) and updated in-memory. maxEventUsdc is a hard operator floor — not evolved by funds.
